description.value: Price 5,005 gp; Slot none; CL 3rd; Weight 2 lbs.; Aura faint transmutation DESCRIPTION On a successful critical hit with this +1 scorpion whip, the wielder can attempt a steal combat maneuver against the target as a swift action as if she had the Improved Steal feat. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 2,655 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells mage hand
